title: ForgeMend
description: ⛏️allows players to repair their items with experience
body:
# ForgeMend
![awdfaw](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/knKifNNO/images/5fc512d632466dcc3e7e89200e69a2cb0fc1e7f3.gif)

ForgeMend is a Minecraft plugin that allows players to repair their items with experience points
 - Repair items with the right click mouse button while holding shift

## Installation

To install ForgeMend, follow these steps:

1. Download the plugin JAR file from the [version page](https://modrinth.com/plugin/ForgeMend/versions).
2. Copy the JAR file to the `plugins` folder of your Minecraft server.
3. Restart your server to enable the plugin.

## Contributing

If you would like to contribute to ForgeMend, feel free to submit a pull request with your changes. All contributions are welcome and appreciated.
